CustomField.description: Lookup (not Master-Detail) to VS_Slot__c, REQUIRED: the bookable 15-minute window this appointment occupies. Lookup because VS_Slot__c.VS_Booked_Count__c is maintained manually inside the parent VS_Session__c's FOR UPDATE lock (D-019/D-020, rules/20 forbids a roll-up here), and a Lookup is what lets VS_BookingService.reschedule() (VS-11) REPARENT this field to a different slot (and therefore a different session) instead of deleting and recreating the appointment row -- design §2.4 calls this out explicitly ("lookup also allows reparenting on reschedule"). Lookup also lets appointments (3 yr retention) outlive the slot row if slots are ever archived separately. deleteConstraint=Restrict: a slot with existing appointments cannot be deleted out from under its booking history.
CustomField.label: Slot
